name: Chinese Almond Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (8 oz.) lard, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bowl, beat together lard, egg, almond extract, sugar, and brown sugar until creamy.
3. Add flour and baking powder, beating until well blended.
4. Shape dough into 1 1/4-inch balls.
5. Place the balls on ungreased baking sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
6. Press an almond in the center of each cookie.
7. Brush cookies with beaten egg yolk.
8. Bake for 14 to 15 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks. Makes about 50 to 55 cookies.
